_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from Augmentation cystoplasty_Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) and Augmentation cystoplasty_PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists).
clinical_indications: Lack of adequate bladder capacity or detrusor compliance
Neuropathic causes (e.g., Spinal cord injuries, multiple sclerosis)
Non-neuropathic causes (e.g., Detrusor instability, chronic cystitis including Tuberculosis and schistosomiasis, Interstitial cystitis)
Shrinking of the bladder caused by any treatments

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings and planned line of treatment

claim.label: Indoor case papers with daily vitals and treatment details
Intraoperative still images/ Post procedure Imaging

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Intravenous pyelogram (IVP) /CT IVP/MRI, Cystogram report suggestive for the need of procedure?
Was the clinical notes and cystogram indicative of procedure?

cpd_claim.q: Was the Intra-operative still images/Post-procedure Images suggestive of the procedure done?

common_queries: Clinical notes and cystogram not indicative of the procedure.
Intravenous pyelogram (IVP) /CT IVP/MRI, Cystogram report not suggestive of the need for the procedure.
Intra-operative still images/Post-procedure Images not clearly showing the procedure performed.
Lack of adequate bladder capacity or detrusor compliance not documented as per clinical indications.
Clinical manifestations (inability to hold urine, spasticity, shrinking bladder) not documented to support diagnosis.

clinical_key_pointers: is a surgery used in patients with lack of adequate bladder capacity or detrusor compliance.
This procedure provides a safe, functional reservoir that allows for urinary continence and prevention of upper tract deterioration.
